findings.description: Section s3 contains only 'なし' (3 chars, far below 50-char threshold). This section has no corresponding h2 heading in the source — the RST horizontal rule (`-------------------------------`) between 基本構造 and 使用例 is a visual separator, not a section heading. No real content exists for this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST has only two h2 headings: '基本構造' (underlined with `---------------------`) and '使用例' (underlined with `-----------------------------`). The `------` lines are bare horizontal rules, not RST section headings.

findings.description: Section s5 contains only 'なし' (3 chars, far below 50-char threshold). Same issue as s3 — the trailing RST horizontal rule (`--------------------------`) at the end of the file is a visual separator, not a section heading.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST ends with a bare `---` horizontal rule after the 使用例 section. This creates no new section in RST.

findings.description: Knowledge file has 5 sections (s1–s5) but the source has only 3 logical sections: the introduction, 基本構造, and 使用例. The two extra sections (s3, s5) were created by misinterpreting RST bare horizontal rules as section boundaries.
findings.source_evidence: RST section count: h1 title '汎用データフォーマット機能' + h2 '基本構造' + h2 '使用例' = 3 sections. The `------` dividers between and after these sections are decorative horizontal rules.
